failedAssertions.reason: Blocked: requires real OpenAI OAuth credentials and browser-based authentication flow. PKCE generation logic is validated in unit tests but the full browser-initiated redirect to OpenAI cannot be tested without real credentials.

Blocked: requires real OpenAI OAuth credentials and browser-based authentication flow. Callback handler logic is validated in unit tests but the full end-to-end OAuth exchange cannot be tested without real credentials.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance sections for Codex Backend Core and Codex OAuth Flow testing surfaces, including isolation rules, boundaries, tool setup, and important notes about credential requirements

override.justification: VAL-CODEX-010 and VAL-CODEX-011 require real OpenAI OAuth credentials and browser-based authentication flow that cannot be simulated in the automated test environment. The underlying PKCE generation and callback handler logic is fully validated through 28 unit tests with mock OAuth servers. These assertions are deferred to the cross-area-integration feature in Milestone 3 where agent-browser can test the full OAuth flow with real credentials.
